[Breakout Room Assignments](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1aiVTxTzjJi18bF9WNqUjbYU-0eW1bzbjV2YJuU9VCKQ/edit?usp=sharing)


| Date | Topics | Handouts | In Class | Assignments |
|--------|---------|------------|--------------|--------------|
| Tue, Mar 18 | Portfolio optimization | [Course intro slides](day1-intro.pdf){target="_blank"}<br>[Mean-variance slides](day1-meanvariance.pdf){target="_blank"}<br>[Excel example](Topic5.1_SharpeRatioExamples_Revised.xlsx){target="_blank"} | [Julius](https://julius.ai/s/0f3dbb0f-0b8e-4027-b435-0c42907a9d92)<br> | |
| Thur, Mar 20 | Review of portfolio optimization<br>Break-outs<br>Simulation and forecasting<br> |[Online data and python report](assets/data.pdf)<br>[Simulation slides](day2-simulation.pdf){target="_blank"}| [Julius](https://julius.ai/s/78de095d-6ede-4a43-bba1-729ef6047689)<br>[video](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/1eCOv1EEVkcEdqtiNAjcSRC-wF7Z1DdTrljICZhyWcBe2YTYFwR2TO4jG48xqoiY.HSq1t9jtD1JSxhZt?startTime=1742491401000)| 1. Portfolio optimization<br>[Solution 1](https://julius.ai/s/workflows/751bff8a-2418-485f-af89-df366f3ae4a6)<br>[Solution 2](https://julius.ai/s/workflows/f89554d1-4a4a-4ff6-a4cb-4fa14c235df7)<br>[Streamlit version](https://kerryback-mgmt675-streamlit-portfolio-optimizer-dxx2jh.streamlit.app/)<br>[Streamlit prompt](https://julius.ai/s/dfcfafb1-70a5-461c-81bf-2f84ff5475d1)|
| Tue, Mar 25 | Retirement planning <br>Break-outs<br>Cost of equity capital | [Retirement planning workbook](assets/RetirementPlanning.xlsx)<br>[Cost of equity slides](day3-costofequity.pdf){target="_blank"}| [video](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/g0BLHjdNRkVVofsCgAEXqrSIu-QSg_eGo1tL_PJMamdbl4zWe9dU1lNdGXp9dx9p.n7yfao_cU94A8tTf) | |
| Thur, Mar 27 | Fama-French model| [Fama-French slides](day3-costofequity.pdf)<br>[Morningstar Quantitative Ratings](assets/Morningstar_Quantitative_Rating_for_Funds.pdf)<br>[Corporate Finance and Reality](assets/JOhnGraham.pdf)| | 2. Simulation<br>[Streamlit version](https://kerryback-mgmt675-streamlit-retirement-app-8d6evr.streamlit.app/)|
| Tue, Apr 1 | Review of Fama-French<br>Break-outs<br>Attribution analysis |<br><br>[Attribution slides](day5-attribution.pdf){target="_blank"}| | |
| Thur, Apr 3 | Financial ratios | [Financial ratios slides](day6-ratios.pdf)| | 3. Attribution analysis|
| Tue, Apr 8 | Capital budgeting| [Capital budgeting slides](day7-capitalbudgeting.pdf)| | Read *The Sneaker Project* before class|
| Thur, Apr 10 | Review of capital budgeting<br>Break-outs<br>Sensitivity analysis|  | | 4. Financial ratios|
| Tue, Apr 15 | Valuation| | | | 
| Thur, Apr 17 | Review of Valuation<br>Break-outs<br>Option portfolios| | | 5. Capital budgeting|
| Tue, Apr 22 | Intro to machine learning| | | |
| Thur, Apr 24 | Applications of machine learning| |  | 6. Valuation|

The assignments are due by 11:59 pm on Thursdays.  Each assignment is a group assignment.  The details are on Canvas.  Upload a link to a Julius workflow for each assignment.
